2603.16648.title: Domain-Independent Dynamic Programming with Constraint Propagation
2603.16648.paper_summary: There are two prevalent model-based paradigms for combinatorial problems: 1) state-based representations, such as heuristic search, dynamic programming (DP), and decision diagrams, and 2) constraint and domain-based representations, such as constraint programming (CP), (mixed-)integer programming, and Boolean satisfiability. In this paper, we bridge the gap between the DP and CP paradigms by integrating constraint propagation into DP, enabling a DP solver to prune states and transitions using constraint propagation. To this end, we implement constraint propagation using a general-purpose CP solver in the Domain-Independent Dynamic Programming framework and evaluate using heuristic search on three combinatorial optimisation problems: Single Machine Scheduling with Time Windows, the Resource Constrained Project Scheduling Problem (RCPSP), and the Travelling Salesperson Problem with Time Windows (TSPTW). Our evaluation shows that constraint propagation significantly reduces the number of state expansions, causing our approach to solve more instances than a DP solver for Single Machine Scheduling and RCPSP, and showing similar improvements for tightly constrained TSPTW instances. The runtime performance indicates that the benefits of propagation outweigh the overhead for constrained instances, but that further work into reducing propagation overhead could improve performance further. Our work is a key step in understanding the value of constraint propagation in DP solvers, providing a model-based approach to integrating DP and CP.
2603.16648.paper_summary_zh: 有兩種流行的基於模型的組合問題範式：1) 基於狀態的表示法，例如啟發式搜尋、動態規劃（DP）和決策圖，2) 基於約束和領域的表示法，例如約束編程（CP）、（混合）整數編程和布爾可滿足性。<lb/>在本文中，我們通過將約束傳播整合到動態規劃中，彌合了DP和CP範式之間的差距，使得DP求解器能夠利用約束傳播來修剪狀態和轉換。<lb/>為此，我們在無域動態規劃框架中使用通用的CP求解器實現約束傳播，並在三個組合優化問題上使用啟發式搜尋進行評估：具有時間窗口的單機排程、資源約束項目排程問題（RCPSP）和具有時間窗口的旅行推銷員問題（TSPTW）。<lb/>我們的評估顯示，約束傳播顯著減少了狀態擴展的數量，使我們的方法在單機排程和RCPSP上解決了比DP求解器更多的實例，並在緊約束的TSPTW實例上顯示了類似的改進。<lb/>運行時間性能表明，對於受約束的實例，傳播的好處超過了開銷，但進一步減少傳播開銷的工作可能會進一步改善性能。<lb/>我們的工作是理解約束傳播在DP求解器中價值的一個關鍵步驟，提供了一種基於模型的方法來整合DP和CP。
2603.16648.author: Imko Marijnissen et.al.
2603.16648.authors: Imko Marijnissen, J. Christopher Beck, Emir Demirović, Ryo Kuroiwa
